description: Galle Pathirannehalage Ranjith Anuradha Pathirana Vs. The Commissioner of Title Settlement and Others before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Galle Pathirannehalage Ranjith Anuradha Pathirana Vs. The Commissioner of Title Settlement and Others
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner sought to have his title registered in respect of a land already acquired by the Government. In fact, he has become the owner after Section 2 notice had been issued, and steps under Section 5 had been taken to identify the land; the land so identified belonged to the 5th Respondent, who had been identified to pay compensation. Therefore, in registering a land under the Title Registration Act, which had already been acquired and identified as a land not claimed by the Petitioner, and the Petitioner’s failure to establish a nexus between his land and the land claimed by the 5th Respondent, the Petitioner’s Application was dismissed.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
